indicators.name: stage with curtains
indicators.rationale: The stage with curtains obstructs the open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Rows of seats block the open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: lack of open floor area
indicators.rationale: There is no open floor area available for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the presence of a stage with curtains and rows of seats that block the open floor space required for these activities. There is no open floor area available for yoga practice.
